name: weekly-dream
prompt: Count the topic files in learning/system-vault/ (anything matching learning/system-vault/*/*.md, excluding index.md and dotfiles). If fewer than 5 files exist, exit cleanly without invoking the skill. This is the first-run, empty-vault guard. Otherwise run the system-vault-dream skill to consolidate the vault. On success, reset dream_failures in .claude/state/vault-circuit.json. On failure, increment dream_failures in the same file and do not retry within this run.
